name: GolfDojo
address: 1154 Niagara Falls Blvd Suite 2, Tonawanda Town, NY 14150
about: GolfDojo is an indoor golf simulator venue operating in Western New York with multiple locations. The facilities use TrackMan dual radar technology in their simulator bays, providing players with high-quality data and course simulations. Public bookings are available daily from 10am to 10pm, with members enjoying 24/7 access. The venue offers memberships, individual and group lessons, and hosts leagues and clinics. In addition to the main facilities, a location is integrated into the 1812 Tavern.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan dual radar technology for accurate ball and club data
24/7 member access for flexible practice and play schedules
Multiple locations across Western New York for convenient access

food_and_drink.notes: Food is available, as evidenced by images of tables with pizza. One location is inside a tavern, suggesting a food service partnership.
Alcohol is available at the 1812 Tavern location, as it is an integrated tavern.

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan dual radar devices are used in the simulator bays.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the venue provides everything needed for the golf simulation experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available for purchase at the venues. The 1812 Tavern location offers food and alcohol service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes can vary depending on the simulator software and number of players, but a typical round takes approximately 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfDojo offers junior lesson packages and is a welcoming environment for families to practice and play.
